title: hardenbergia monophylla
intro: Hardenbergia monophylla, also known as the purple coral pea or native sarsaparilla, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hardenbergia monophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
